title: L’articolo 21 nella gabbia di Facebook - Terzogiornale
Le fake news circolano senza Meta
snippet: L’articolo riporta i risultati di uno studio condotto da Fabio Giglietto sulla visibilità della politica italiana su Facebook dopo le modifiche agli algoritmi di Meta, evidenziando un drastico calo delle visualizzazioni dei post politici (da circa 70.000 a 15.000) e sottolineando la necessità di accesso ai dati per la ricerca.
description: The article on lespresso.it reports on a study by Fabio Giglietto regarding the visibility of Italian politics on Facebook after Meta's algorithm changes, highlighting a significant decrease in views and emphasizing the need for data access for research.

title: Less political content in feeds, Meta's clampdown less effective against extremists - Il Sole 24 ORE
description: News article from Il Sole 24 ORE

title: Ricerca su algoritmi Meta: scompare la politica istituzionale e volano gli estremismi
snippet: Blog post che descrive uno studio guidato da Fabio Giglietto dell’Università di Urbino (datato 7 gennaio 2026) che mostra come i contenuti istituzionali sono scomparsi dai feed di Facebook mentre aumentano quelli estremisti, grazie all’analisi di oltre 2,5 milioni di post.
description: A blog post describes a study led by Fabio Giglietto of the University of Urbino showing how institutional content has disappeared from Facebook feeds while extremist content has increased, based on the analysis of over 2.5 million posts.

title: "A Pretty Blunt Approach": Meta's Political Content Reduction Policy and Italian Parliamentarians' Facebook Visibility | Sciety
snippet: Fabio Giglietto is the author of this article which examines Meta's political content reduction policy using a dataset of over 2.5 million Facebook posts from Italian parliamentarians, prominent politicians, and political extremist accounts spanning 2021–2025.
description: This Sciety entry highlights an article by Fabio Giglietto analyzing Meta's political content reduction policy using Facebook data from Italian politicians and extremist accounts, spanning 2021-2025.

title: DIGITAL SOCIAL NETWORK ANALYSIS - Lecturer: Fabio Giglietto - A.Y. 2025/2026 - Uniurb
snippet: This page describes the Digital Social Network Analysis course taught by Fabio Giglietto at the University of Urbino. It mentions the course's objectives, program, and learning achievements related to digital media analysis, data collection from the web and social media, and critical interpretation of research results.
description: This Uniurb webpage describes the 'Digital Social Network Analysis' course taught by Fabio Giglietto, focusing on digital media analysis and data collection from social media, aligning with his expertise.
